name: Fox Island Builder
author: Poki
description: Fox Island Builder is a crafting game where you play as an adorable fox on a mission to save ducklings scattered across a magical island. To rescue all the ducks, you need to collect resources to unlock new sections of the island. Chop trees, collect grasses, mine rocks, and so much more! Can you be the hero fox and save all the cute ducks? How to play Fox Island Builder? WASD, arrow keys are drag your mouse to move! Who created Fox Island Builder? Fox Island Builder is created by CAMU. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Fox Island Builder for free? You can play Fox Island Builder for free on Poki. Can I play Fox Island Builder on mobile devices and desktop? Fox Island Builder can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
